subject: l2-m20k-bw-banked-outreg1
notes: MEASURED on the physical Arrow AXC3000 2026-07-09 via quartus/l2_m20k_bw/sysconsole/l2_read.tcl over JTAG (control-plane only; CYCLES time the on-chip M20K read datapath, not JTAG — PLAN §8 method E). GEOMETRY=banked OUTPUT_REG=1, 32 independent M20K banks x 4B, K=1000000 reads/reader, CYCLES=1000002, f_clk=300.0 MHz. Achieved 38.400 GB/s = 100.0% of the 38.400 GB/s banks*bytes/port/cycle*fclk ceiling (PLAN §3 LV3). Integrity: all 32 per-bank checksums + the aggregate (0xA0347796) + cycle count matched scripts/l2_golden.py exactly, verified live on board; this recorder re-checks the aggregate + cycles before emitting.
